caption: A man with a tall, light-gray, textured hairstyle and glasses is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt and a patterned bow tie. He wears black over-ear headphones and sits before a black microphone on a boom arm. The background features a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs and various items of clothing. In each frame, the man's facial expression shifts slightly as he speaks, with his mouth opening and closing. Overlaid on the screen are logos for "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST," with the word "PODCAST" appearing smaller beneath the main text. As the sequence progresses, the man remains in the same position, but his head tilts and his lips move, capturing a brief moment of him talking into the microphone.
